content: Hey, I'm Shiloh, nice to chat with you. I've been thinking about my budget and I'm not sure if I'm doing it right. I work as a Pastry Chef at a Michelin-starred restaurant in New York City.
Hi Shiloh, nice to meet you! Congratulations on working at a Michelin-starred restaurant, that's impressive. What specifically are you struggling with in terms of budgeting?
Well, I recently started a YouTube channel and I'm not sure how to track my expenses for it. I'm spending around $500 per month on equipment and editing software.
That's a great hobby! Tracking expenses for your YouTube channel can be a bit tricky. Have you considered using a separate bank account or a budgeting app to keep track of your expenses?

Yeah, I've been using a budgeting app, but I'm not sure if I'm categorizing my expenses correctly. I also want to make sure I'm saving enough for taxes. My accountant told me I should save around 25% of my income.

That's a good point. Categorizing expenses can be important for tax purposes. It might be helpful to consult with your accountant to make sure you're doing it correctly. What's your estimated annual income from your YouTube channel?
I'm hoping to make around $20,000 per year from my YouTube channel. I've also been thinking about investing in a retirement account, maybe a Roth IRA.
That's a great goal! Investing in a retirement account is a good idea, especially if your employer offers a match. Have you considered contributing to a 401(k) or a SEP-IRA?

Yeah, I've been looking into it. I think I'm going to contribute around 10% of my income to a retirement account. I also want to make sure I have enough money set aside for emergencies, maybe 3-6 months' worth of expenses.
That's a good idea. Having an emergency fund can help you avoid going into debt when unexpected expenses come up. What's your monthly income from your job as a Pastry Chef?
I make around $5,000 per month. I've also been trying to cut back on unnecessary expenses, like dining out. I've been cooking at home more often and trying out new recipes.
That's a great way to save money! Cooking at home can be healthier and more cost-effective than dining out. Do you have any other sources of income or expenses that you'd like to discuss?
Yeah, I've been thinking about selling some of my pottery online. I've been making pottery in my free time and I think I could sell it for around $100 per piece.
That's a great idea! Selling your pottery online could be a good way to earn some extra income. You could consider using a platform like Etsy or eBay to sell your pieces.
